_example_purpose: Package A paper-eval trial illustrating all four orthogonal experiment-mode comparison fields set simultaneously. Plan refs: PR #79, doc 10 §3.3 P2.3 / PR #101, doc 12 §14 / PR #110, doc 12 §9 Phase 5 / PR #111. Production payloads leave these four fields unset; only experiment runners populate them. Paper-eval can vary one dimension while holding the others fixed by toggling individual fields across runs.
